meta.idealistNote: Toy Drive 2026 Volunteer Directors — published 2026-07-15; long URL + admin in Corporate Administration/data/idealist-listing-template.json (toydrive-2026-directors)

event.name: Elk Grove Toy Drive Celebration
event.dates: Mid-December 2026 · Sunday afternoon–evening · date to be finalized
event.tagline: free celebration · unwrapped toys for local charities
event.attendanceNote: Planning baseline ~800 guests at the celebration; mission goal 1,000+ toys

hero.headline: Help build the 10th Annual Toy Drive
hero.intro: The Elk Grove Toy Drive Celebration gathers unwrapped toys for children served by local charities — and hosts a joyful evening with Santa photos, dinner, crafts, and entertainment. Sponsors fund the fete. Volunteers make the magic.
hero.subhead: We're looking for directors — one owner per piece of the celebration. Pick the lane you want to lead.
hero.body: We need directors — people who own an outcome, build a small team, and see it through with chair support. Chairs Vivian and Mamie (cPALSs) back every lane.

steps: Pick one role (or two if they're closely related — we'll talk). See the full list on Team.
Apply on Idealist — name your role, preferred contact method (email, text, or phone), and any events you're already committed to this season.
We'll follow up within a few business days — introduce you to the chairs, share last year's runbooks, and set a first check-in.
apply.idealistFallback: Can't use Idealist? Email contact@elkgrovetoydrive.com with the role name and one sentence on why you're interested.

directorIntro.title: What is a director?
paragraphs: A director is the go-to person for one celebration lane. You don't have to do every task yourself — you own the plan, coordinate vendors and volunteers, and report status to the chairs. Most roles are planning now through December 2026; peak workload is the two weeks before and event day.
Already covered: Event chairs — Vivian and Mamie (cPALSs). Chairs hold decision authority for the season; every lane director is open for 2026 recruitment.

14 director roles are open across guest experience, toys & partners, and outreach & production. Member and support roles fill in behind each director. Returning volunteers are welcome to apply — nothing is assumed until confirmed.
notes: Fund the Fete at /fund-the-fete/ is the interactive sponsorship registry — named celebration gifts with slot counts.
Toy collection for charities is the mission; the celebration evening is how the community gathers and sponsors fund hospitality.
Volunteers Director owns shifts; chairs help cover gaps when a lane is still filling.

productionMeetings.title: Production meetings
productionMeetings.intro: Stay connected with Toy Drive production — join the weekly Zoom call.
productionMeetings.zoom: Weekly Zoom calls are Fridays at 9:00 AM (confirm each season). To join as a guest, email contact@elkgrovetoydrive.com.

lanes.title: Guest experience
lanes.subtitle: What families see and remember
lanes.intro: Celebration programming and hospitality — including sponsor-funded features from Fund the Fete.

roles.title: Entertainment
roles.own: Run-of-show, performer booking, magic/live acts cues
roles.fit: Like schedules, stage energy, and talent follow-through

roles.title: Santa Photo
roles.own: Santa talent, photographer liaison, photo line flow, backdrop
roles.fit: Can run a high-volume family experience calmly

roles.title: Crafts
roles.own: Crafts tables, supplies, volunteer staffing for make-and-take
roles.fit: Enjoy kid activities and material logistics

roles.title: Kids Games
roles.fit: Can keep several stations stocked and fair for kids

roles.title: Food & Dinner
roles.own: Dinner service, food sponsors, serving flow, dietary notes
roles.fit: Have catering, nonprofit meal-service, or large-kitchen experience

roles.title: Decor
roles.own: Christmas décor plan, install/strike, entrance wow moments
roles.fit: Love transforming a room on a budget and a deadline

roles.title: Raffle
roles.own: Raffle inventory (cash + in-kind), ticket sales flow, prize display
roles.fit: Are organized and comfortable asking for prize donations

lanes.title: Toys & partners
lanes.subtitle: Mission fulfillment
lanes.intro: Toy collection for local charities and guest/volunteer coordination.

roles.title: Toys & Charities
roles.own: Toy collection goals, intake standards, charity drop-off coordination
roles.fit: Care about equitable distribution and nonprofit logistics

roles.title: Registration
roles.own: Guest registration platform, check-in flow, capacity caps

roles.title: Volunteers
roles.own: Recruitment, shifts, waivers, day-of briefing, appreciation
roles.fit: Know how to mobilize people and keep shifts covered

lanes.title: Outreach & production
lanes.subtitle: Get people there and keep the night running

roles.title: Sponsorship
roles.own: Corporate pipeline, Fund the Fete asks, sponsor deliverables
roles.fit: Can build business relationships and follow through on sponsor commitments

roles.title: Marketing & Communications
roles.own: Email, Instagram, website updates, organic promotion
roles.fit: Write clearly and want Elk Grove families to find us

roles.title: Media
roles.own: Photo/video vendors, highlight reel handoff, press kit

roles.title: Production & Logistics
roles.own: Venue load-in/out, floor plan, ops radio, vendor arrivals
roles.fit: Love maps, timelines, and where does the truck go?

faq.a: Helpful, not required. Prior Toy Drive runbooks and chairs back you up.
These are volunteer leadership roles. Photographers or performers may be paid vendors when sponsored — not director compensation.
One name on the roster as Director; co-leads listed as Members is fine.
Our interactive sponsorship registry — named celebration gifts with slot counts, at elkgrovetoydrive.com/fund-the-fete/.

faq.q: I'm already helping with other cPALSs festivals — can I do both?
faq.a: Yes — tell us your season commitments on Idealist and we'll coordinate lanes so nothing collides.

about.headline: About Elk Grove Toy Drive Celebration

sections.title: The celebration
paragraphs: Each December, Community Partners Advocate of Little Saigon Sacramento (cPALSs) hosts the Elk Grove Toy Drive Celebration — a free family evening with Santa photos, dinner, crafts, kids games, entertainment, and the gathering of unwrapped toys for children served by local charities.

Our goal is simple: no child should be without a toy this Christmas. Last seasons we have delivered 1,000+ toys with community partners. Sponsors fund the hospitality of the evening through Fund the Fete; guests bring unwrapped toys; volunteers make the night run.

sections.title: Where & who
paragraphs: The celebration is typically held at District 56 in Elk Grove (Civic Center Drive). Exact Sunday date for 2026 will be announced when the venue hold is confirmed.
Toy Drive is a project of cPALSs. Questions: contact@elkgrovetoydrive.com (fallback ToyDrive@cPALSs.com).

footer.thankYou2026: Thank you to our Toy Drive sponsors and supporters
